data.title: President Angela Snyder to retire from Fulton Financial Corporation on Dec. 31, 2025.  Angela has been a pillar of strength.
data.description: In Lancaster, Pennsylvania, on August 1, 2025, Fulton Financial Corporation (NASDAQ: FULT) made public that President Angela Snyder is set to retire from the company on December 31, 2025. During her tenure at Fulton Financial Corporation, Angela Snyder has played a pivotal role, showcasing strong leadership, strategic vision, and commitment.

data.title: Trazeetravel.com awards inaugural Joey Fecci Award for Culinary Excellence in Yardley, PA on Aug. 1, 2025.
data.description: The prestigious recognition is a tribute to the memory of Chef Joey Fecci from YARDLEY, Pa. On August 1, 2025, Trazee Travel, an online platform under FXExpress Publications, Inc., alongside Global Traveler and whereverfamily.com, is proud to reveal the special award.

data.title: Radiance Technologies hires Jay E. Town as Chief Compliance Officer, bringing extensive legal experience. Former United States Attorney.
data.description: In Huntsville, Alabama on August 1, 2025, Radiance Technologies disclosed the appointment of Mr. Jay E. Town as their Chief Compliance Officer. With a background in legal and compliance fields, Mr. Town's tenure as a former United States Attorney speaks to his wealth of experience. Excited about this addition, Radiance is eager to benefit from Mr. Town's expertise in ensuring adherence to regulatory standards within the organization.

data.title: Summit Hotel Properties declares Q2 2025 dividend of $0.08/share for shareholders. Board of Directors authorizes.
data.description: In Austin, Texas on August 1, 2025, Summit Hotel Properties, Inc. announced that their Board of Directors approved a cash dividend for the second quarter of 2025. The dividend declared is $0.08 per share of common stock. The Company operates under the stock symbol NYSE: INN.

data.title: Boston Beer Company CEO transition: Jim Koch to become CEO, Michael Spillane to stay on board.
data.description: Jim Koch, who is the Founder, Brewer, and Chairman of the Board, will be taking on the role of CEO. This change in leadership will see Michael Spillane continuing to serve on the board of directors. The company announced that this transition in positions will come into effect soon. With this move, Koch will be at the helm of the company's operations, bringing his expertise and experience to the role of CEO. The decision is part of the strategic direction of the company to further strengthen its leadership team. As a prominent figure in the company's history, Koch's transition to CEO marks a significant milestone.

data.title: WhereverFamily announces winners of eighth annual awards for family travelers on Aug. 1, 2025.
data.description: A web publication focusing on family travel, WhereverFamily, recently announced the winners of the Wherever Awards in YARDLEY, Pa., on August 1, 2025. WhereverFamily is a trusted source for family travel and is affiliated with FXExpress Publications, Inc. where it showcased exceptional travel destinations and services.

data.title: John Hancock closed-end funds declare monthly distributions; Payment Date: Aug. 29, 2025.
data.description: On August 1, 2025, the John Hancock closed-end funds announced their monthly distributions. The declaration date was August 1, 2025, with the ex-date and record date set for August 11, 2025. The payment date for the distributions is scheduled for August 29, 2025. Investors can expect distributions per fund as listed below: [Include specific fund names and distribution amounts].

data.title: Helix Energy Solutions to participate in upcoming events: Citi’s Natural Resources Conference in Las Vegas on August 13, Barclays CEO Energy-Power Conference in New York on September 3, and Pickering Energy Partners Energy Conference in Austin.
data.description: In Houston, Helix Energy Solutions Group, Inc. (NYSE: HLX) revealed its plans to attend key industry events. This includes the Citi’s 2025 Natural Resources Conference at the Encore Las Vegas in Nevada on August 13, 2025, the Barclays 39th Annual CEO Energy-Power Conference at the Sheraton New York Times Square Hotel in New York on September 3, 2025, and the Pickering Energy Partners Energy Conference at the Hotel Van Zandt in Austin, Texas. These events are significant opportunities for Helix Energy Solutions to engage with stakeholders and discuss industry trends.

data.title: ImageneBio grants inducement stock options and RSUs (total 589,585 shares) to new CEO Dr. Kristin Yarema.
data.description: On July 28, 2025, ImageneBio, Inc. (Nasdaq: IMA), a biotechnology company focusing on treatments for immunological/autoimmune and inflammatory diseases, gave equity awards to Dr. Kristin Yarema, the newly appointed CEO. These awards, suggested by the Compensation Committee and endorsed by the Board of Directors, comprised 436,080 inducement stock options for common stock purchase and 153,505 inducement restricted stock units for common stock. The total inducement awards, given to Dr. Yarema as part of her employment agreement, were granted in accordance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).
WH Sr. Adviser Hassett ends remarks on Fox Business News.

data.title: Trazeetravel.com announces winners of its 11th annual The Trazees awards for travelers aged 25-42 on August 1, 2025.
data.description: A popular online platform catering to travelers aged 25 to 42 has recently revealed the winners of its 11th annual The Trazees awards. The announcement was made in Yardley, Pennsylvania on August 1, 2025 via a PRNewswire release. Trazee Travel, a publication under the FXExpress Publications, Inc. umbrella alongside Global Traveler and whereverfamily.com, hosted the awards ceremony.

data.title: FXExpress Publications, Inc. awards travel industry leaders in its fourth year with Industry Leader Awards.
data.description: YARDLEY, Pa., August 1, 2025 - FXExpress Publications, Inc., known for publications like Global Traveler, trazeetravel.com, and whereverfamily.com, has announced the recipients of its Industry Leader Awards for the fourth consecutive year. The prestigious awards recognize top performers in the travel industry.
US bank deposits rose to $18.322 tln from $18.297 tln in the prior week.

data.title: Leidos Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: LDOS) declares $0.40 quarterly cash dividend, payable on Sept. 30, 2025.
data.description: Today, Leidos Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: LDOS), based in Reston, Virginia, declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.40 per share for its common stock. The dividend, approved by the board of directors, will be paid on September 30, 2025, to shareholders of record.

data.title: MarketWise declares $0.40 per Class A share dividend; Second Quarter 2025 Financial Results Release Date announced.
data.description: On August 1, 2025, MarketWise, Inc. (NASDAQ: MKTW), a prominent digital subscription services platform offering financial research, software, education, and tools for self-directed investors, disclosed that its Board of Directors sanctioned a quarterly cash dividend of $0.20 per share to Class A common stockholders on July 31, 2025. Additionally, an equal $0.20 per unit distribution was authorized for holders of MarketWise, LLC units (Class B common stock).
Fitch Ratings: The US effective tariff rate settles at 17% with the July 31st duties.

data.title: Maryland American Water seeks rate increase due to $22 million investments in last 7 years, filing request with PSC.
data.description: In Bel Air, Maryland, Maryland American Water has submitted a request to the Maryland Public Service Commission for new rates, citing $22 million in water system upgrades since their previous rate adjustment. This request underscores the company's dedication to modernizing infrastructure and ensuring top-tier water services in accordance with environmental guidelines for their customers' benefit. Their aim is to maintain high-quality service through ongoing investments in water system improvements.
